name: Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark
description: Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark (MCSB; formerly Azure Security Benchmark) — security best practices and controls for Azure and Microsoft 365 services. Aligned with industry standards (NIST SP 800-53, CIS Controls, PCI DSS) with per-service implementation guidance.
relationToCloudSecurity: The Microsoft-native counterpart to AWS Well-Architected and Google Cloud Architecture Framework for the Microsoft cloud surface.
relationToAISecurity: AI services on Azure (Azure OpenAI, Azure AI services) inherit MCSB guidance.

license.notes: Vendor-published framework. Verify specific license terms at the source URL before redistribution.
